programme.title: 🌊 1.8m @ 12s CROSS
programme.desc:
The 1.8m swell is manageable, assuming you enjoy a 4km/h crosswind trying to relocate you to Peniche.
🌊 Swell: 1.8m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 4.0km/h SSW (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 12.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.0m

programme.desc:
